nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: Bacillus/Lactobacillus/Honeysuckle Flower/(Biota Orientalis/Eclipta Prostrata/Mentha Arvensis/Morus Alba/Perilla Frutescens Leaf)/(Ecklonia Cava/Houttuynia Cordata Leaf/Stem)/Citrus Japonica Peel/Polygonum Multiflorum Root/Soybean Extract Ferment
chemicalDescription: This is the product obtained by the fermentation of an extract of the flowers of Lonicera japonica (honeysuckle); the leaves of Biota orientalis, Eclipta prostrata, Mentha arvensis, Morus alba, and Perilla frutescens; the leaves and stems of Ecklonia cava, and Houttuynia cordata; the peel of Citrus japonica; the roots of Polygonum multiflorum; and the soybean, Glycine max, by the microorganisms Bacillus, and Lactobacillus.
inciName: BACILLUS/LACTOBACILLUS/HONEYSUCKLE FLOWER/(BIOTA ORIENTALIS/ECLIPTA PROSTRATA/MENTHA ARVENSIS/MORUS ALBA/PERILLA FRUTESCENS LEAF)/(ECKLONIA CAVA/HOUTTUYNIA CORDATA LEAF/STEM)/CITRUS JAPONICA PEEL/POLYGONUM MULTIFLORUM ROOT/SOYBEAN EXTRACT FERMENT
